name: zetic_mlange
description: Flutter FFI SDK for running ZeticMLange on-device AI models on Android and iOS.
prepare_command:
set -euo pipefail

if [ ! -d "ZeticMLange.xcframework" ]; then
  curl -fL "https://github.com/zetic-ai/ZeticMLangeiOS/releases/download/1.8.0/ZeticMLange.xcframework.zip" -o ZeticMLange.xcframework.zip
  rm -rf "ZeticMLange.xcframework"
  unzip -q ZeticMLange.xcframework.zip
  rm -f ZeticMLange.xcframework.zip
fi
